testsuite.name: GlobalExceptionHandler

testcase.name: deve retornar 400 com lista de detalhes para MethodArgumentNotValidException
deve retornar resposta com status correto para CheckoutException

testsuite.system-out:
2026-02-22T10:49:33.741-03:00 ERROR 54587 --- [ Test worker] c.m.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Checkout error: API Error 2026-02-22T10:49:33.742-03:00 ERROR 54587 --- [ Test worker] c.m.c.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unexpected error
